items.name_en: NANO ALMA MINI Shell Collection M82717 Uninspected Version
items.name_cn:
NANO ALMA MINI Shell Collection M82717 Uninspected Version
■Size: 18*12*8cm ■
Nano Alma captures the essence of the classic!
A Mini refined and compact design that makes a splash, featuring a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap!
The iconic Shell silhouette, which has always held center stage since 1934, is simple yet elegant and fashionable. It is an essential 'must-have' for every girl.
Its refined and compact shape looks like a stylish pendant when worn, with enough capacity to meet daily needs!
The new design is more user-friendly, satisfying various height requirements. It's a beauty icon—promise me, you really need to get this!

This handbag is the perfect miniature version of the original Speedy, featuring exquisite stitching and being incredibly lightweight. ✨Shoulder strap is detachable and adjustable

items.name_cn:
NÉONOÉ Classic Series #M44020# Uninspected Version
▪️Dimensions: 26*26*17.5cm▪️
As a classic work, it is a rhythm where everyone has one
The wine bag designed in 1932 for carrying champagne meets contemporary trends,
Transforming into a bucket bag containing the beauty of heritage,
Also known as the 'King of Classics',
Regardless of era or age,
It has a different attraction, with a large capacity design,
This is a classic king that can accompany you through the prosperity of the world, and is also a bucket bag every woman must have!
